label: MinecraftClient
documentation: Provides access to the client-side world, player information, and utility methods like messaging and particles.

label: worldIsRaining
documentation: Returns whether it is currently raining in the world.

label: worldIsThundering
documentation: Returns whether it is currently thundering in the world.

label: worldIsRainingAt
documentation: Checks if it is raining and getting wet at the specified chunk position.

label: worldDayTime
documentation: Returns the current in-game world time in ticks.

label: blockLightAt
documentation: Returns the block light level at the specified position.

label: skyLightAt
documentation: Returns the sky light level at the specified position.

label: lightLevelAt
documentation: Returns the combined light level at the position, preferring the lower of sky light or block light.

label: narrate
documentation: Triggers the Minecraft narrator to read the specified message aloud.

label: localPlayer
documentation: Returns the PlayerEntity object representing the local player.

label: getScoreboardScore
documentation: Retrieves the value for a specific player on a specific scoreboard objective.

label: displayMessage
documentation: Displays a simple string message in the chat or action bar.

label: displayMessage
documentation: Displays a styled VanillaText message in the chat or action bar.

label: spawnParticleInWorld
detail: MinecraftClient.spawnParticleInWorld(particleId: Identifier, pos: Vector3f, initialVelocity: Vector3f, alwaysSpawn: boolean = false): void
documentation: Spawns a vanilla particle at the given position with an initial velocity.

label: renderDistance
documentation: Returns the current render distance configured in chunks.

label: getWorldPlayers
documentation: Returns a list of all PlayerEntities currently within the client's render distance.

label: gamePaused
documentation: Returns whether the game is currently paused. Note: JCM/TSC simulation continues even when paused.

label: VanillaText
documentation: A class for creating and styling complex text components for chat, titles, and item tooltips.

label: literal
documentation: Creates a text component from a literal string.

label: translatable
documentation: Creates a text component using a translation key and optional placeholders.

label: append
documentation: Appends another VanillaText component to the current one, preserving individual styles.

label: withBold
documentation: Applies a bold style to the text component.

label: withItalic
documentation: Applies an italic style to the text component.

label: withFont
documentation: Sets a specific font Identifier for the text component.

label: withColor
documentation: Sets the text color using an RGB integer.

label: withColor
documentation: Sets the text color using a predefined color name string.

label: getString
documentation: Returns the final localized literal content of the text component.

label: ItemStack
documentation: Represents an instance of an item, including its type and stack size.

label: itemId
documentation: Returns the internal item ID (e.g., 'mtr:rail').

label: translationId
documentation: Returns the translation key for the item's display name.

label: empty
documentation: Returns true if the item stack is empty (e.g., Air).

label: count
documentation: Returns the number of items in the stack.

label: PlayerEntity
documentation: Represents a player entity, providing access to their position, rotation, movement state, and equipment.

label: uuid
documentation: Returns the unique UUID of the player as a string.

label: hasPermissionLevel
documentation: Checks for a specific 'OP' level. Note: This is client-side only.

label: pos
documentation: Returns the exact current position of the player.

label: blockPos
documentation: Returns the integer block position coordinates of the player.

label: smoothPos
documentation: Returns a smoothed position vector, recommended for rendering high-FPS overlays.

label: velocity
documentation: Returns the player's current velocity vector.

label: yaw
documentation: Returns the horizontal (yaw) rotation of the player's head.

label: pitch
documentation: Returns the vertical (pitch) rotation of the player's head.

label: bodyYaw
documentation: Returns the horizontal (yaw) rotation of the player's body.

label: playerName
documentation: Returns the player's official username.

label: isHoldingItem
documentation: Checks if the player is holding the specified item in either hand.

label: mainHandItem
documentation: Returns the item currently held in the player's main hand.

label: offHandItem
documentation: Returns the item currently held in the player's offhand.

label: activeItem
documentation: Returns the currently active item, prioritizing the main hand.

label: isSneaking
documentation: Returns true if the player is currently sneaking.

label: isSprinting
documentation: Returns true if the player is currently sprinting.

label: isSwimming
documentation: Returns true if the player is currently swimming.
